era_context: Identical to 2600–2601 BCE: Early Dynastic Period III Mesopotamia, Fourth Dynasty Egypt, mature Indus Valley Civilization. No major transitions or events are documented for this year.
geographic_coverage_gaps: All regions: no specific documentation exists for this year
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified; no events are documented for this year to contradict.
historiographic_note: 2602 BCE is archaeologically and historically invisible. No contemporary sources, inscriptions, or later chronicles document specific events for this year. The year exists only as a conventional point on the proleptic Gregorian calendar. This is typical for the vast majority of years in the ancient world before the development of precise chronological systems.
